Description
com.societegenerale.failover.configuration
Spring Boot auto-configuration for the failover framework.
com.societegenerale.failover.execution.resilience
Resilience4j integration for failover method execution.

  • Uses of MethodExceptionHandler in com.societegenerale.failover.configuration

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    MethodExceptionHandler
    FailoverAutoConfiguration.methodExceptionHandler(MethodExceptionPolicy methodExceptionPolicy)
    Registers the MethodExceptionHandler that applies the active exception policy.
    Methods in com.societegenerale.failover.configuration with parameters of type MethodExceptionHandler
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    FailoverExecution<Object>
    FailoverAutoConfiguration.failoverExecution(FailoverHandler<Object> failoverHandler, MethodExceptionHandler methodExceptionHandler)
    Registers BasicFailoverExecution, active when failover.type=basic (the default).
    FailoverExecution<Object>
    ResilienceFailoverExecutionAutoConfiguration.failoverExecution(FailoverHandler<Object> failoverHandler, MethodExceptionHandler methodExceptionHandler, io.github.resilience4j.circuitbreaker.CircuitBreakerRegistry circuitBreakerRegistry)
    Registers ResilienceFailoverExecution backed by the application's CircuitBreakerRegistry.
